data.title: Why Is Restaurant Company Sweetgreen Stock Surging Today?
data.description: Sweetgreen reported strong Q2 FY24 revenue results, beating expectations. Revenue increased 21% Y/Y to $184.6M and same-store sales rose 9%.

data.title: Time To Buy CrowdStrike? Analyst Says 'If You Loved It At $350, You Should Absolutely Love It At $250' After Recent Microsoft Outage Drove Stock Down
data.description: CrowdStrike is facing legal action over a global outage that impacted air travel last month.

data.title: Wall Street Shifts To 'Bossing The Fed Into Big Rate Cuts' After Bank Of Japan's Policy U-Turn, Analyst Says
data.description: BoJ's sudden U-turn on policy has sparked Wall Street reactions, with eyes on significant Fed interest rate cuts. Bank of America's Hartnett believes Wall Street influenced BoJ's decision and now aims to pressure Fed into cuts to avoid economic turmoil.

data.title: Cannabis-Focused Finance Company Silver Spike Reports Higher Q2 Net Income, Declares Dividend
Benzinga's 'Stock Whisper' Index: 5 Stocks Investors Secretly Monitor But Don't Talk About Yet
data.description: Benzinga's Stock Whisper Index highlights five stocks seeing above-average interest from readers during the trading week.
